SpaceX files IPO 💰, OpenAI shares sink 📉, the spec layer 👨‍💻

  • This is what AI was supposed to feel like.

  • The bedrock of most retirement plans is some variation of the 60/40 portfolio. Is it about to fail us?

CEO Brief: What Being an Astronaut Taught a CEO

  • Scott Parazynski spent last night as many people did. “I'm watching the NASA feed as we speak,” he told me a couple of hours before the Artemis II lau
  • But Parazynski’s perspective is a bit different than most people’s. He flew on five different shuttle missions and walked in space seven times.
